text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for lending me
that manga. The story was simply
wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You liked it!? Any parts in particular?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's see now… I especially liked
the line, "It is not enough to be loved.
You must love in return."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
When the heroine resolved to overcome
her passive nature and fully accept her
own feelings… That really touched me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah! Wow… You've grown so much, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That moment she confessed her love has
such brilliance… And you totally got it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes! That's why I've decided to try
the same right away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, cool, that's — huh? Try it?
W-Wait, what are you ——

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: My dear Ryan… I love you! Truly!♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whuh?! Um, uh, wooow! Me?!
Geez, you scared me for a second there!
